tagline: News that shows what affects you now.

designSystem.style: Dark-first data-driven news interface with electric cyan accent, deep navy surfaces, category-coded color system (coral for transit, cyan for weather, violet for education, amber for traffic), SVG city map overlay, and timeline milestone trackers

screens: Home — Pulse feed with relevance-ranked news cards, personal impact score banner, expandable 'What this means for you' briefs, and lower-relevance story list
Map — Interactive SVG city map with colored event pins, storm radius overlay, route highlight, tap-to-expand event popups, and nearby events list
Alerts — Active live alerts with LIVE badge, recent alert history, and per-category toggle switches for transit, weather, education, traffic, and economy
Tracker — Ongoing story milestone timelines with progress bars, live/resolved status badges, expand/collapse interaction, and story progress tracking
Settings — User profile, dark/light theme toggle, personal context (home, work, commute, school), topic interest pill filters, and relevance engine calibration card
